entry.title: Re: SMQ2でステータスRUNNINGのまま滞留しているメッセージをSOLUTIONMANAGERで検知する方...
entry.content:
SMQ2のRFCの監視が目的であるとのことですので、下記ドキュメントのシナリオ3に該当すると思われます。

qRFC Channel (sap.com)
-> Scenario 3: qRFC with inbound queue (and outbound queue)

> ①4.Define Scopeまでは入力不要ですか？
　
1-1) すべてのインタフェースチャンネルに対してアラートが発生した際にメールの転送まで必要となる場合は、ステップ2.3のNotification設定が必要となります。
アラート毎に設定する場合は、設定ステップ5.3にて、各インタフェースチャンネル毎に設定することも可能です。
1-2) ステップ2.6の「New Content Available」に「No」ではなくバージョンが表示されていた場合、「Upgrade」を押下していただき、適用して頂く必要がございます。
1-3) ステップ2.7の必須アクティビティである「Basic ICMon Configuration」に黄色の感嘆符が表示されましたら、再実行が必要となることを意味しますので、再実行して頂く必要がございます。
　
ステップ１から４までの設定に関しましては下記のドキュメントをご参照頂ければと思います。
Interface and Connection Monitoring Setup (sap.com)
　
> ②4.Define Scopeで、InterfaceMonitoring-Scenario Creationの入力部分について、
> External ServicesとHostsにはどのような情報を入力すればよいですか？
　
監視対象のシステムがAribaやCloud Integration、Bydesign等のABAPとJAVA以外のSAPシステムであった場合はExternal Serviceに、監視対象がホストであった場合にはHostに設定します。
監視対象システムがABAPかJAVAのみであれば、External ServicesとHostsには特に設定して頂く必要はございません。
　
> ③5.2Configuration で、ソースとターゲット両方とも一つのシステムしか設定できませんでした。監視したいのはターゲット側のSMQ2にあるRFCですが、どう設定すればよいですか？
　
Define Scopeにて作成するシナリオには監視対象となるソースシステムとターゲットシステムの両方を設定して頂く必要がございます。
ステップ5にて一つのシステムのみ表示される理由は該当のシナリオに一つのシステムのみ設定された為となります。
対象システムがABAPかJAVAシステムであった場合は、シナリオをご作成なさる際に、Technical Systemsへ対象システムすべてを設定して頂く必要がございます。
　
> ④'Status for Interim'にRUNNINGの設定がうまく保存できません。どうすればよいですか？
　
「*」で表示されている項目は必須項目となります。必須項目の設定が抜けた場合、エラーとなり正しく保存されません。
qRFC Channel (sap.com)
-> Monitoring Template: qRFC
-> Maintain the Interface:
　
上記ドキュメントの「Maintain the Interface」部分をご参照頂き、Mandatoryと表示されている項目はすべて設定してくださいますようお願いいたします。
※キューグループにアスタリスク(*)のご使用の場合、キューグループの値の最後に設定される場合のみサポートされます。キューグループの値の最初や中間に設定されたアスタリスクは無視されます。
　
尚、手入力はサポートされませんので、マウスをテキストボックスの上に置いて頂くことで表示される右側の小さなボックスアイコンを押下していただき、表示されたリストから値を選択してくださいますようお願いいたします。
InboundとOutboundにて選択できるステータスは、下記のドキュメントよりご確認頂けます。
qRFC Channel (sap.com)
-> Further Information
-> qRFC Status Codes

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

As you want to monitor RFCs in SMQ2, it would be the scenario 3 in the below document.

qRFC Channel (sap.com)
-> Scenario 3: qRFC with inbound queue (and outbound queue)

> ①Are any special inputs required for the steps before the step 4. Define Scope?
　
1-1) If you want to get the notification email for alerts on all interface channels, it needs to be configured in 'Notification' tab of the step 2.3.
If you want to configure it for each alerts, it can be done via the step 5.3.
1-2) If any versions are displayed for 'New Content Available' instead of 'No' in the step 2.6, 'Update' should be executed to update the content.
1-3) If a yellow exclamation mark is displayed for the mandatory activity 'Basic ICMon Configuration' in the step 2.7, it should be executed.
　
Details about the step 1 to 4 can be found from the below document:
Interface and Connection Monitoring Setup (sap.com)

> ②At the step 4. Define Scope, what should be entered for External Services and Hosts in the section 'InterfaceMonitoring-Scenario Creation'?
　
If the monitored system is not an ABAP or a Java system e.g. Ariba, Cloud Integration or Bydesign, it can be added under 'External Service' section.
If you want to monitor the host, it can be added under 'Hosts' section.
If the monitored system is an ABAP or a Java system, you don't need to configure anything under 'External Services' or 'Hosts' section.
　
> ③AT the step 5.2 Configuration, when creating the interface channel, only one system can be entered. we would like to check the status of the receive queue that can be checked using transaction SMQ2. I would like to know how to set it up.
　
In the scenario which is created in the step 'Define Scope', all monitored systems including source and target should be added.
If only one system is displayed in the step 5, it is because only one system was added in the scenario.
If the monitored systems are ABAP or Java systems, all of those should be added under 'Technical Systems' when creating a scenario.
　
> ④RUNNING cannot be selected for 'Status for Interim' when Queue group is empty. Which information should be entered?
　
Columns which are displayed with asterisk (*) are mandatory configuration items. If those are missing, 'Save' would not work fine.
　
qRFC Channel (sap.com)
-> Monitoring Template: qRFC
-> Maintain the Interface:
　
Please check the details of the mandatory items from the above documentation and configure all mandatory items.
If you are going to use the asterisk (*) for Queue Group, only the asterisk which is placed at the end of the queue group value will be supported. If the asterisk is placed in front of the queue group value or middle of it will be ignored.
　
Also, manual input of status is not supported. By placing the mouse cursor on the text box of 'Status of Interim', a little box will be displayed on the right side. Please click on it and select the value from the list.
Each available status for Inbound and Outbound can be checked from the below documentation:
qRFC Channel (sap.com)
-> Further Information
-> qRFC Status Codes

entry.title: And indicator or report can show the confirmation9IW41) was processed by DP90
entry.content:
Hello Experts, Is there any way to check what all hours are processed by DP90?

EG: 1st DP90 process 10 hours of service order Then I confirm 15 hours in service order So is there any indicator that 10 hours are billed and 15 hours are not billed?

entry.title: Re: Scope item 6GD - How to obtain a complete report with...
entry.content: Yes, the product profitability with production variances only shows value flow from processes with the account assignment as EO, for example make-to-stock, make-to-order with valuated sales order stock. The account assignment PR – project is not showing here. It shows in project profitability, which does not show the production variances as the way in product profitability, this is a known feature gap will be considered in the new report of project profitability, including variance split by categories, COGS and its split for ETO.

entry.title: Re: Set Initialize Value for Purchase Order in S4HANA
entry.content:
Hi,

From my perspective, there is no way to call custom fields in this BAdI. And this BAdI doesn't provide details about parameters and way to use, it is a little tricky.

Best Regards,

Zhehui

entry.title: Re: Data Access Control in Modeler in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: Then not really sure how you would like to define your data security

entry.title: Re: How to do authorization check for personnel no (PERNR...
entry.content:
Hi sallyxu-cn

To ensure that only authorized personnel can confirm orders, you can use the authorization object P_PERNR (HR: Master Data – Personnel Number Check). This object allows you to control access based on personnel numbers.

Here’s how you can apply it to your scenarios:

1.
Personnel no. specified in work center capacity:
• You can use the P_PERNR authorization object to check if the personnel number assigned to the user matches the one specified in the work center capacity.
2.
Personnel no. linked to HR infotype 1001 (relationship) for qualification control:
• Similarly, the P_PERNR authorization object can be used to verify if the personnel number linked to the HR infotype 1001 is authorized for order confirmation.

To activate and configure this check, you need to set the switch for P_PERNR to 1 in the system settings www.authorizationexperts.com/sap/p_pernr/. This will enable the personnel number check during order confirmation.

entry.title: How planning strategy 70 controls the creation of P.I.R?
entry.content: Dears, i've known that in PS - Material Component, it supports Planning Independetn Requirement creation for a material with planning strategy 70, but only preliminary PR for others such as 40/50... My question is, which indicator or paremeters controls such function?  Could any one help on that? Thanks,

entry.title: Re: And indicator or report can show the confirmation9IW4...
entry.content:
Hi chao_a_qian

Yes, you can track the hours processed by DP90 and identify which hours have been billed and which have not. Here are a few ways to do this:

1.
Dynamic Item Processor (DIP) Profile:
• The DIP profile used in DP90 can help you track billed and unbilled hours. You can configure the DIP profile to include specific criteria that differentiate between billed and unbilled hours.
2.
Service Order Confirmation:
• In the service order, you can check the confirmation details to see the total hours confirmed. The hours that have been billed through DP90 will be marked accordingly.
3.
Billing Document:
• After running DP90, you can check the billing document created. The hours billed will be reflected in the billing document, and you can compare this with the total hours confirmed in the service order.
4.
Reports and Tables:
• You can use specific reports and tables to track billed and unbilled hours. For example, the table COVP contains information on the actual costs and quantities, which can help you identify the hours processed by DP90 https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/faq-resource-related-billing-dp90/ba-p/13007166https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/dp90-transaction-problems/qaq-p/6681502

entry.title: Re: How to add a custom tile from the Service Binding the...
entry.content:
Thank you for the documentation. After reviewing it, I noticed that all the solutions require a license for SAP Business Application Studio.

  1. Is there a solution that doesn't require SAP Business Application Studio?
  2. If a license is necessary, how is it calculated? I have one developer to create the app, and ten end users who will use it. Will this count as eleven licenses ?

Pricing for SAP Business Application Studio

Pricing from : https://www.sap.com/sea/products/technology-platform/business-application-studio.html#pricing

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation Pre-built content for SAP SuccessFactors Use cases
entry.content:
The definition of pre-built content, how it helps your business to jump-start your automation development and how to discover them is explained in the blog, ‘Accelerate Business Process Development with SAP Build Process Automation Pre-Built Content’

This blog covers the pre-built content for SAP SuccessFactors use cases, specifically.

SAP SuccessFactors provides cloud-based Human Capital Management (HCM) software solutions that cater to various aspects of managing an organization's workforce. Here are some common use cases where SuccessFactors is typically utilized:

  1. Talent Acquisition and Recruiting
  2. Employee Onboarding
  3. Learning and Development
  4. Employee Central

These use cases illustrate how organizations leverage SAP SuccessFactors to manage various aspects of their workforce efficiently, enhance employee engagement, and drive business success through strategic HR practices.

SAP Build Process Automation is used along with the SAP SuccessFactors application as an extension to solve complex business use cases and fill gaps that are not planned in the near future as a feature in SAP SuccessFactors. These are identified and validated as a white space in the SAP SuccessFactors product. Examples of the processes include- Contract Employee End Date Extension, Create Permission Group, Creation and Approval of Mass Job Requisition, Merge User in Learning Management System etc.

Currently there are 10+ SuccessFactors use cases for which pre-built content exists in SAP Business Accelerator Hub

They can be used with no or very minimal changes which makes it as industry best practice.

In order to discover the SuccessFactors use cases, follow the steps mentioned in the blog ‘Accelerate Business Process Development with SAP Build Process Automation Pre-Built Content’

Or you can simply use the below link to see them in SAP Business Accelerator Hub.

https://api.sap.com/build?$filter=(Products:%5B%22SAP%20SuccessFactors...

 

Explaining some of the SAP SuccessFactors Use-cases:

 1: Contract Employee End Date Extension

In SuccessFactors, managing the end date extension for contract employees involves utilizing step-by-step functionalities within the system to handle the extension of employment contracts, seamlessly.

This pre-built content streamlines and automates the process of extending the end date of the contract employee within the SAP SuccessFactors.

This process expedites the contract extension process, reducing manual effort and improving efficiency.

SOLUTION ARCHITECTURE:

It has the below features:

  • The template uses below API:
    • Employment Information API - To fetch the details of contract employee using filter for employee class.
    • User Management API - To retrieve Display Name, Job Tittle, and Email ID of the given user id
  • Upsert API - To update the contract end date of the employee          
  • This template works only for Contract Employees whose employee class is Contractor/3rd party.
  • Fetch operation – fetches contract employee’s data from SAP SuccessFactors using APIs, whose contracts are ending in x days from current date (e.g., 7 days from today).
  • Contract Extension Reminder Notification & Task:
    • Email notification is sent to the manager of the contract employee specifying the necessary information.
    • A contract extension request email is generated and sent to the designated manager’s SAP Build Process Automation inbox.
    • The designated manager reviews the contract employee details.
    • The manager has the option to either extend the contract end date or retain the contract end date.
  • Based on manager’s decision, contract end date changes:
    • If the manager wants to extend the contract end date with the new contract end date, the system performs necessary steps to update the contract end date in the HR system.

You can add the pre-built content into your tenant and explore more details via the below link.

Link to the template in Business Accelerator Hub

 

2: Creation and Approval of Mass Job Requisition

The creation and approval of mass job requisitions in SAP SuccessFactors are crucial for efficiently managing large-scale recruitment needs within organizations. By allowing HR departments to create multiple job openings simultaneously, it enhances operational efficiency and ensures consistency in job descriptions and requirements across various positions.

The approval process helps maintain budgetary control and compliance with organizational policies, ensuring that hiring aligns with strategic objectives. This streamlined approach not only accelerates the recruitment process but also supports scalability, enabling organizations to adapt swiftly to changing workforce demands while maintaining quality and compliance standards throughout.

This pre-built content streamlines and automates the process of creating and approving a job requisition within the SAP SuccessFactors system.

It does so by extracting the necessary data from a source file, often an Excel document, and utilizing relevant APIs to create and approve the requisition. Upon successful completion of the process the job requisition is in the 'Open' status. These requisitions can be published to internal and external job sites, making it available for candidates to view and apply for the respective job positions. This end-to-end process not only reduces manual data entry and processing but also enhances the speed and efficiency of job requisition creation and approval within the organization's hiring workflow.

SOLUTION ARCHITECTURE:

 

This template content involves several key steps:

  • API Usage: The process utilizes the JobRequisition API for creating job requisitions, approving them and handling declines.
  • Template Limitation: It is tailored for Basic Job Requisitions (Template ID - 1141).
  • Template Preparation: Users must fill a predefined Excel template with job requisition details; any number of files can be placed in a specified folder.
  • Process Trigger: The process begins by entering the Requestor email ID and folder path.
  • File Handling: The automation fetches and processes files from the designated folder.
  • Approval Notification: Approvers receive email notifications containing the job requisition ID for review and approval.
  • Approval Process: Approvers decide to approve or reject job requisitions.
  • Status Updates: Depending on the decision, the system updates the job requisition status accordingly.
  • Process Conclusion: The process concludes after status updates, moving processed files to a 'Processed' folder with timestamped renaming.
  • Notification Management: Email notifications inform stakeholders about process initiation and any errors encountered during execution.

You can add the pre-built content into your tenant and explore more details via the below link.

Link to the template in Business Accelerator Hub

 

3: Merge User in Learning Management System (LMS)

The Merge User functionality in SAP SuccessFactors Learning Management System (LMS) is essential for maintaining data integrity and operational efficiency.

It enables administrators to consolidate duplicate user profiles, which often occur due to system migrations, organizational changes, or multiple entries for the same individual. By merging these profiles, organizations ensure accurate learner records, streamline administrative tasks, improve reporting accuracy, and enhance the overall user experience by providing consistent access to learning content and progress tracking.

This feature not only reduces complexity in managing user data but also supports compliance efforts.

SOLUTION ARCHITECTURE:

This template contains several key steps :

  • The template utilizes OAuth Token API and AI_mergeUser API for integration.
  • Users fill out a predefined Excel template with User ID details, which can be stored in any named folder.
  • Starting the process requires providing the requestor email ID and folder path.
  • The automation fetches and processes files from the designated folder, handling multiple files simultaneously.
  • After processing, the status of each record is updated in the file's columns.
  • Processed files are moved to a 'Processed' folder within the same path, renamed with a timestamp if necessary.
  • Email notifications are sent upon process completion or in case of errors during execution.

You can add the pre-built content into your tenant and explore more details via the below link.

Link to the template in Business Accelerator Hub

 

4: Manage Employee Central Stalled Workflows

Managing stalled workflows in SAP SuccessFactors is crucial to maintain operational efficiency and ensure timely HR processes. Stalled workflows can delay critical actions such as employee onboarding, promotions or leave approvals, leading to dissatisfaction among employees and potential compliance issues. By actively managing these workflows, HR teams can identify and resolve bottlenecks, ensuring that tasks progress smoothly through the approval chain.

This proactive approach not only improves organizational agility but also enhances employee experience by reducing delays and fostering a responsive HR environment that supports business continuity effectively.

This pre-built content manages stalled workflows in Employee Central by getting input from the end user on what action to be performed on the stalled workflow. Upon successful completion of the process, workflow will be either declined or moved to valid approvers. This end-to-end process not only reduces manual data processing but also enhances the speed and efficiency of the business process.

SOLUTION ARCHITECTURE:

The following steps are included in Manage Employee Central Stalled Workflows template:

  1. Read Operation: Fetch pending workflows from SAP SuccessFactors with status "PENDING".
  2. Update Operation: Decline or reassign the workflow based on the selected action in SAP SuccessFactors. i.e.
    • Decline Workflow
    • Change Approver to Supervisor
    • Change Approver to Incumbent of Parent Position
  1. Email Notification: Send email to requestor/end user on:
    • Successful execution
    • Errors during execution

You can add the pre-built content into your tenant and explore more details via the below link.

Link to the template in Business Accelerator Hub

Other interesting use cases that you may want to explore in SAP Business Accelerator Hub with respect to SuccessFactors LOB are:

1: Create Permission Group

Creating permission groups with the given configuration setting is a manual task. In case there are many groups that need to be created, it is an even more tedious task which is time consuming and prone to error.

This template automates creating permission group in the SAP SuccessFactors System. It is more time-efficient for the users to upload a pre-populated excel template with the necessary data than creating permission groups individually in the SAP SuccessFactors system.

2: Job Offers Approvals

The Job Offers Approval template provides efficient solution to a time-consuming HR hiring process. It tackles a common issue faced by organizations, where delays in offer approvals can lead to extended hiring timelines. In such cases, Human Resources (HR) team often find themselves repeatedly following up with hiring managers or approvers to obtain the necessary approvals within the company's HR system.

However, with the Job Offers Approval process template, this entire procedure is simplified and made much more efficient. Approvers no longer need to go into the HR system and can instead swiftly grant their approval through an easier process. This whole workflow is initiated within the SAP Build Process Automation platform, ensuring that the offer approval process is both quick and smooth. This not only speeds up hiring but also makes HR operations smoother and less cumbersome, ultimately benefiting both the organization and the candidates involved.

entry.title: Re: Fragment not supported in CIM(Component Integration M...
entry.content:
@daniyal_dolare 
Include _SchemaVersion to 23.12 in your base application.app

entry.title: Re: Export custom report as csv file
entry.content:
Dear @Tayane ,

Thank you for your answer.

There is no other ways to download custom report as csv file?

Best Regards,

KhaingZIn

entry.title: Can we read standard Change Documents in S/4HANA Cloud Public using class CL_CHDO_READ_TOOLS?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

In some SAP Blog posts and SAP Notes, it's mentioned to use class CL_CHDO_READ_TOOLS to read Change Document information.

Today, I created a test class to read change documents for object EINKBELEG (Purchasing Documents) and got some exception "You are not authorized to display change documents".

I did a test by reading a Custom Change Document and the code worked perfectly.

I have read all standard documentation mentioning class CL_CHDO_READ_TOOLS, but none of the pages mention any restriction related to reading Standard Change Documents.

SAP Help - Reading Change Documents 

This is my code:

CLASS zktest2 DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.
   INTERFACES if_oo_adt_classrun.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS zktest2 IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD if_oo_adt_classrun~main.
    TRY.
        cl_chdo_read_tools=>changedocument_read(
          EXPORTING
            i_objectclass = 'EINKBELEG'
          IMPORTING
            et_cdredadd_tab = data(lt_cdredadd_tab)
          ).
      CATCH cx_root INTO DATA(lo_root).
        DATA(lv_message) = lo_root->get_text( ).
        out->write( lv_message ).
    ENDTRY.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

has anyone faced this issue?

entry.title: Re: How to add Snowflake as a source for SAP Datasphere or SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Stefan - Thanks for the detailed blog.  

We are trying to create remote source in our On-Premise HANA-SDI by following the above steps. 

However, we are getting the following error in displaying the objects under the schema.

[129];transaction rolled back by an internal error:invalid token was found while parsing the remote source configuration string.

Here is the script being used 

' CREATE REMOTE SOURCE "TSTSFK03" ADAPTER "CamelJdbcAdapter" AT LOCATION AGENT "dpagent_<dpagentServerName>"
CONFIGURATION
'<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<ConnectionProperties name="configuration">
<PropertyEntry name="dbtype" displayName="Database Type" isRequired="true">other</PropertyEntry>
<PropertyEntry name="driverClass" displayName="JDBC Driver Class" isRequired="false">net.snowflake.cliend.jdbc.SnowflakeDriver</PropertyEntry>
jdbc❄️//.AWS_WEST_2.snowflakecomputing.com?db=TEST01&warehouse=compute_wh&role=dwc_role
</ConnectionProperties>'
WITH CREDENTIAL TYPE 'PASSWORD' USING
'<CredentialEntry name="db_credential">
<user>user01</user>
<password>Passo1word</password>
</CredentialEntry>';

There is no error logs available framework.trc files.

Please review and let us know your findings to have this connection.

Thanks in advance,

Regards

Srini

 

 

'

entry.title: Re: Fragment not supported in CIM(Component Integration M...
entry.content:
Hi @Arunachalam ,

After updating _SchemaVersion to 23.12, the error message has gone. What all does it affect in my app after updating the schema version can you help with that?

And thanks for the solution.

entry.title: Re: Settings to avoid notch on the rotated view for iPhone app
entry.content:
Dear Dan, 

Thank you for your answer. If I dont need the black bar, but just want the text on the left not to be in the notch (not "eaten" by the notch) and dont care about the notch shape, what would be a simpler setting to be sure that the text on the left is not eaten in landscape mode, assuming a solution with just one container? Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Fragment not supported in CIM(Component Integration M...
entry.content: Hi @daniyal_dolare,

entry.title: Standard Freight and Discount Charges need to print in PO output form in SAP S4 Hana Public Cloud.
entry.content:
Hello SAP Gurus,

As per the below image freight and discount are maintained.

While creating a purchase order, In the “Create Purchase Order- advanced” app, pricing elements it is maintained in conditions, so according to this if we take “condition amount “from “itemPricingConditionNode” as per the content form, we will get the total amount of “ PMP0  Manual gross price“ Condition type, As we required the total amount of freight and discount.

Freight and discount both field total amount need to be displayed in form output separately.

Thanks and Regards,

Chetan.

entry.title: Re: Fragment not supported in CIM(Component Integration M...
entry.content: Schema validation and code completion are based on _SchemaVersion.

Thanks,
Srinivasa HM

entry.title: Re: Freight Unit is not created automatically for Sales O...
entry.content:
Hello, 

I had also faced similar issue in the past at the delivery level. If everything is configured perfectly, please check the BSG settings once.

entry.title: Re: Settings to avoid notch on the rotated view for iPhone app
entry.content:
I feel like this is one of those coding contests that asks to solve a task with the fewest lines of code 😆

Well, I thought my solution was pretty good, and if you don't want the black bar you can just set the background of that container to transparent.

But if you insist, you can create a single container to hold your UI, and set the Left gap using a formula similar to the one in the previous message.

And use a formula like this:

IF(CONTAINS(systemVars.orientation,"landscape"),25,0)

Resulting in this:

entry.title: Re: How to you remove Action links in Adapt UI
entry.content: Hi Ramin S, Perhaps I wasn't clear... your end resolution is exactly what I was recommending to you ... you have to look at the WHOLE role design including the business catalogs. You should also use the Launchpad App Manager or Launchpad Content Manager Client-Specific to find the related tiles/TMs using the Semantic Object. You could also look at my recent blog for more assistance, i.e. SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA - Upgrade Faster - More use cases for the Launchpad Content Aggregator

entry.title: Pricing Badi for On Prem S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi All,

There are Badi's to create routines for Pricing in S/4 HANA Cloud Version.

Link Below:2756560 - Cloud BAdIs for pricing | SAP Knowledge Base Article

Is there something similar for On Prem Version?

Thanks,

Priya

entry.title: I want to know the source of my datasets seen in S4HANA import connection
entry.content: We usually work with S4HANA live connections for all data models built in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). Recently when I was creating datasets, I could see a lot of views listed under the import connection (see attached). I am not sure what is the source of data for these tables or views. Any pointers to the actual source of data. We need to understand the validity of data in these tables (when were they last loaded/refreshed). Without knowing the actual source, I am not able to answer the data validity questions. Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Text Size based on device type in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
You should be able to select from the system variables.

This is systemVars.runtime for me, and I'm not sure why it would not work for you. 

Are you working with a deployed version? Android?

P.S.: Why are there 2 empty replies on this thread?

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Plain "REST" endpoint (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content: Indeed! 🙂

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Text Size based on device type in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi Dan,

Yes, I am testing the app with the deployed version.

Its true that while running the deployed URl of app in desktop Browser the value of "systemVars.runtime" is retured as "web", but the problem is that the URl when it is running on Iphone Browser(Safari) or Android Phone Browser(Chrome) the value of "systemVars.runtime" is retured as "web" as well. So, with this system Variable we could not determine whether the Application is running on Desktop Browser or Mobile Phone Browser.

I have also tried with system Variable "systemVars.formFactor" but we are getting the response as "desktop" for both in Desktop and Mobile browser.

Thanks and Regards,

Abhishek Sengupta

entry.title: How to pick and Config highest tax percentage from PO line team
entry.content:
Hi All,

how to pick and configure the Highest Tax % for condition type value?

For Example: In PO I added the below material with other conditions types

1. Material 1-  10 Qty Price _10 INR_ Tax is 18%

2. Material 2- 10 Qty_ Price 10INR _Tax % is 12 %

Condition Type: Freight charges- 5 INR, Packing and Forwarding- 5 INR, Insurance charges- 5 INR. The total cost is 15 INR

My requirement is:

1. Material 1- 10 INR + 1.8 INR= 11.8 INR

2. Material 2 10 INR+ 1.2 INR= 11.2 INR

Condition type : 15 INR+ 2.7 INR( 18%)= 17.7 INR

Total Tax rate is: 1.8 INR + 1.2INR +2.7 INR= 5.7 INR 

Total PO Value is: 11.8 +11.2+17.7= 40.5 INR

How SAP pick the highest Tax % value that is 18% and calculates the % for condition type amount.

 

Regards,

Sathish Kumar T

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content: That's great to hear, thanks!

entry.title: Re: Task 6 - API endpoint with payload required (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs"
entry.content: Excellent! Would it help to have a quick discussion on different ways in JS to do this? There are many, I could suggest a few ...

entry.title: Re: Process Chains - Start an S/4 job only after successf...
entry.content:
Best imho is always to use an external scheduler, simply because there you can configure more complex rules and error handling than in the sequencial execution of IBP application jobs. CI-DS and IBP offer an external API for schedulers, so it should be not too complex to connect whatever tool. Even BW process chains should be able to connect with some additional effort creating a proxy-report to communicate with CI-DS / IBP.

Note 2503171 will help for the IBP interface.

Kind regards
Harry

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Text Size based on device type in SAP Build Apps
entry.content: Ahhh ... can you try orientation or device variables? The runtime would still be web since you are running in a browser. I don;t know how the variables work when you are on a mobile device but running in a browser.

entry.title: Re: Report layout not showing in BPC Add ins using with EPM
entry.content:
As documented in KBA 3139849 - EPM context bar, context pane and member selector does not show members within the EPM Add-in when using MS Office 365, please

  • Ensure that the EPM Add-in version used is the EPM Add-in SP38 Patch09 or higher, as this behavior should have been resolved in the EPM Add-in SP09 release as documented in the SAP Note 3139108 - ALL: Transparent controls (blank popups, empty panes and context) 
  • Switch the Office Theme to White, Dark Grey or Black following the steps below.
    - Open MS Excel.
    - Go to the 'File' menu.
    - Click on the 'Options' button.
    - Go to the 'General' section.
    - Within the 'Personalize your copy of Microsoft Office' section.
    - Set the 'Office Theme' to 'White', 'Dark Grey' or 'Black'
    - Close and Restart all Excel instances on the machine.

  • Ensure to use the Semi-Annual channel version for the Office 365 on production system as referenced in the KBA 3123380 - EPM Add-in compatibility with the latest Microsoft Office versions
    • The monthly-channel versions are meant for users who are ready to test new Excel versions in advance and encounter some defects/ regressions.
    • These versions are not recommended for productive usage and for any user, as mentioned by Microsoft.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Text Size based on device type in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
I have tried with Orientation as well its gives response as undefined. But I have managed to find out a solution but dont know if thats the right way to achieve its or not. You can suggest if its correct.

I am using the below formula

IF(systemVars.dimensions.viewport.width < 768,Mobile,Desktop)

entry.title: Project Coding Mask Visibility in Project Definition Issue - SAP PS, SAP S4 Hana
entry.content:
Dear All,

PFA the screenshot of the Project Definition (CJ20N), which I'm trying to use to create and use in a project. but in the Red Highlighted area, I'm unable to get this Project Coding Mask visible and make its entry number in below Red Highlighted area.

Please guide me, from which Field Status Group (T-Code) we can get this Field of Project Coding Mask visible in this Red Highlighted area.

entry.title: Solution Manager migration
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Currently our solution manager is on Sybase ASE (16.0.04) database, we are planning for DB migration to PERSON_NAME 2.0.

Please let us know if any commercials are required to do this.

 

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Solution Manager migration
entry.content:
Dear customer,

For explanation on Solution Manager 7.2 migration procedure, please see SAP Community blog https://blogs.sap.com/2016/05/04/simplified-upgrade-and-migration-to-sap-solution-manager-72/ and SAP Note 2345636 as well.

Both SWPM tool or SUM DMO(for ABAP part) are supported. Following guide would help:

  1. SUM DMO( http://support.sap.com/sltoolset)
    1. SAP Note 3296402 for DMO with SUM 1.1 SP 02
    2. Guides for DMO with SUM 1.1 SP 02
  2. SWPM
    • https://help.sap.com/docs/SOFTWARE_PROVISIONING_MANAGER/30839dda13b2485889466316ce5b39e9/baf86558573d43faa20068ec39751efb.html

Best regards,
Sylas
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hello!
My name is Anna. I'm 41 years old. I'm from Ukrainian. I identify as a person in 2 categories:
- Women
- People looking to switch their careers mid-life.
I have a degree of Administrative management.
Now I work as an analyst in Local firm.
But I want to find a better work in foreign company.
That's why I need to study SAP.

entry.title: Re: Error deploying to Hana Cloud: Configuration does not...
entry.content: So after hustling for a while, the solution was to keep hana artifacts in db/src folder and cds files in db/ folder.

@Arunachalam  @bill_froelich @Pathik

entry.title: HANA engine depend on which factors ?

entry.title: Re: SQL Caught Rabax
entry.content: Hi All, While executing the Z-transaction it is pulling a huge amount of data from the DB, the dump shows that the ABAP program error and TSV_TNEW_PAGE_ALLOC_FAILED, you have to enable the trace to analyze z transaction to fix the issue.

entry.title: Customize Freight Order Worklist
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am a newbie in SAP TM thus need some help here. We want to add a new column in the FO worklist that is visible in the NWBC. This field with have few options in dropdown showing the reason for less utilization of the trucks. Can this be achieved? If yes can someone guide or share me some blogs/document for this.

Appreciate your help.

entry.title: Error while hybrid testing xsuaa
entry.content:
I am getting the following error while hybrid testing of xsuaa with the command "cds bind --exec -- npm start --prefix app/router"

#2.0#2024 07 23 06:16:08:254#+00:00#INFO#/Auth/OAuth2#####1a570975-e3b0-46c5-9ab7-24a0de27345a####Jqmab6crIGGyZ_n8aT0wfn8ZbDbwgRpm######1a570975-e3b0-46c5-9ab7-24a0de27345a#PLAIN##query does not exist for request url /app/index.html#
#2.0#2024 07 23 06:16:08:254#+00:00#INFO#/Auth/OAuth2#####1a570975-e3b0-46c5-9ab7-24a0de27345a####Jqmab6crIGGyZ_n8aT0wfn8ZbDbwgRpm######1a570975-e3b0-46c5-9ab7-24a0de27345a#PLAIN##sending page with client-side redirect to https://7d2927dbtrial.authentication.us10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/authorize?response_type=code&client_id=sb-usertestrepeat!t309561&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fport5000-workspaces-ws-xl8wd.us10.trial.applicationstudio.cloud.sap%2Flogin%2Fcallback#
#2.0#2024 07 23 06:16:08:254#+00:00#INFO#/Auth/OAuth2#####1a570975-e3b0-46c5-9ab7-24a0de27345a####Jqmab6crIGGyZ_n8aT0wfn8ZbDbwgRpm######1a570975-e3b0-46c5-9ab7-24a0de27345a#PLAIN##x-forwarded-path header: undefined#

 I'm not sure what it means when it says "query does not exist for /app/index.html".

I've added the oauth2 redirect uris as adviced in the authentication section of capire, xsuaa hybrid-testing.

I'm not sure what i am doing wrong here.

Also following is the screen i get when i run my "cds bind --exec -- npm start --prefix app/router" command.

entry.title: Re: First Program with AMDP method
entry.content: Good one. BTW You have missed passing mandt in the where clause in the amdp method.

entry.title: Re: Migrating from Workflow Management to SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: Thanks for your guide. I am trying to migrate one of our own workflows to the SAP Build Process Automation, but I have problems activating it in the subaccount. Did you use the same subaccount that already contained the workflow service or did you create a new one?

entry.title: Re: Settings to avoid notch on the rotated view for iPhone app
entry.content:
@Dan_Wroblewski 

Dear Dan, I have tried to put all in a container and with left spacing your formula IF(CONTAINS(systemVars.orientation,"landscape"),35,0).

It works well on the condition that the landscape is in one direction. If in the other direction of landscape (-180 degree, I should put on the right spacing).

Is there a variable to detect which landscape direction it is? (the notch could be on the left or on the right depending on the turn direction from portrait)

Thank you

Chantal

entry.title: Re: Creating a DLL to run SAP Crystal Reports
entry.content: i am facing same issue working with .net core 6 what should I do

entry.title: Re: Error while processing Proxy request in soap to proxy...
entry.content:
Hi Aditya,

As per my understanding based on your detail message: the problem is "XML tag Main/@versionMinor has the incorrect value 001. Value 000 expected". That means integration find out an unexpected value: "Main/@versionMinor".

P2 tag, contains unexpected value => 001

P3 tag, contains expected value => 000

How did you get the SOAP WSDL? check versionMinor value, because the expected value should be "000"

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Creating a DLL to run SAP Crystal Reports
entry.content: i am facing same issue working with .NET core 6 what should I do

entry.title: Re: How should the correct definition of "Range&quot...
entry.content:
Just to clarify the logic behind the described system behaviour:
In your first example, you have basically set a criteria where WERKS = '' (initial). There might be some business use cases where such a criteria does make sense.
If you want to ignore the criteria of this field, you must leave the range empty, like you've done in the second example.

entry.title: Re: Settings to avoid notch on the rotated view for iPhone app
entry.content:
@Dan_Wroblewski 

Dear Dan,

I found the solution.

On the global container of the whole page

left spacing formula

IF(CONTAINS(systemVars.orientation,"landscape_left"),35,0)

Right spacing:

IF(CONTAINS(systemVars.orientation,"landscape_right"),35,0)

Best regards

Chantal Chi

entry.title: Re: Error while processing Proxy request in soap to proxy...
entry.content:
Hi @p2001107813 

Got the WSDL from  monitoring in Integration Suite after deploying the artifact. Could you please let me know where can I find and modify the versionMinor value.

entry.title: Re: OData V2 Request fails and no error message is displayed
entry.content: It's embedded

entry.title: if end if inside the case end -case
entry.content:
Hi Gurus, 

   Hope all are doing good. I have faced something weird in debugging which is what I have not expeccted. I am using IF ENDIF inside the CASE ENDCASE. However I can see the if condition inside the case endcase is not working.

here is the screenshot 

I am using in PBO of screen.

You can see from the above screenshot, when sy-ucomm = 'GET_G' , it has to check if condition ztwdate field value . If it is 0 or initial, it should skip the if clause. 

We can see in debugging that WA_DATA-ztwdate  is initial, but still it is going inside if loop .

Any idea why it is happening.  ?

Kindly please help me as I was already late in fixing the issue.

entry.title: New Bank Accounts don't appear in manual bank statement?
entry.content:
Hello All,

I've been requested to add new bank accounts and I did that in FI12. End user has done the test in the quality system and informed that the 2 new bank accounts are not among the accounts in FF67 (Manual Bank Statement Overview).

My question is how to make those new bank accounts show in the Manual Bank Statement Overview list?

What's the complete process of creation new bank accounts so that they show in all related lists & tables.

Thank you in advance for your help.

I Install Suse Linux 15 and fresh Install Sap 10.00.2402 Also upgrade database Sap 10.00.200 = Done

SAP UPGRADATION DONE FROM ver: B1H10002402HF to ver:B1H1000_2405

BUT

when I upgrade database from 2402 to 2405 we are facing error

Please find attachment error log & error print screen

 

Regards

Neeraj Upadhyay

entry.title: Hello team, Requirement is in custom report.
entry.content:
I am calling the VA05 transaction in the report, I want the output in one internal table to proceed further. How to achieve it. Please help on it. 

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Re: Generic ABAP utility class to upload and download Excel spreadsheet
entry.content:
Welcome to the community and thanks for sharing.
However, downloading/uploading an XLSX/CSV is a very popular subject, with a new blog post being published almost every month.

Two comments regarding your solution:
1. Your CSV implementation might be too simplistic. e.g. It doesn't handle a case in which the field value itself contains the field separator character.
2. The conversion to XLSX file (FM TEXT_CONVERT_XLS_TO_SAP) has a very significant technical restriction: It works only in foreground of Windows workstations (with OLE). Please check also ABAP2XLSX.

entry.title: Trigger a Counter based Maintenance Plan based on Usage Count
entry.content:
I have an end user that would like to setup a Maintenance Plan to be triggered once a specific equipment is used 6 times.

I setup a Measurement Point as a Counter with a Unit of Measure of each. (I was testing different Annal Estimtate values.)

And assigned it to a Maintenance Plan like this.

I then entered 6 counters (counting up by 1 each time) until I got to 6. Running Deadline Monitoring on each entry of a usage counter did not trigger a Work Order.

Any suggestions on how I can get the Maintenance Plan to create a Work Order based on a usage of multiples of 6 times?

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

happy to join the community.

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Blocking Reason
entry.content: I have same requirement. How to define blocking reason id. I could not find any solution for this. Is this related to version management for po?

entry.title: Re: Updating records to the database table from a file using ODATA service
entry.content: For the conversion of a CSV line into ABAP structure, you should better make use of FM RSDS_CONVERT_CSV. It support also handling of values which include the separator character ("," in your case) by utilizing an escape character, like described in the CSV RFC.

entry.title: Implementing Multiple Risk Classes for Business Partner Credit Management in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

Our company's credit management process requires the ability to assign different risk classes to the same customer based on the credit segment they are associated with. Is there a way or a recommended approach in S/4HANA to achieve this requirement? We need to maintain distinct credit limits and credit control parameters for each credit segment independently for the same customer.
Any insights, best practices, or configuration tips would be greatly appreciated.
Regards,

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK - push notifications and other issues
entry.content: looks like  tutorial works only for MDK SDK approach not for cloud build approach. Could you check and confirm please @Jitendra_Kansal . Also how to get source code(android) for the mobile client generated by cloud build feature ? thanks

entry.title: Re: Listing without DC or store.
entry.content:
Hi, 

Just to clarify first what do you mean by listing - according to my experience not everyone understands the same when talking about listing.

So, listing creates listing condition valid for an article and assortment. 
Now, from this point of view by having a global assortment without having any site (store/DC) assigned, it is possible to list the article without any virtual or physical store or DC, as you were asking.

However, during an initial listing - where also some site assignment does exist - so called article segments are also created as part of the process (MARC, MBEW, etc.). Some people think of listing as creation of just these entries.

Now, as the listing as such has the purpose to determine whether and when can be procured a specific article in a specific location, without having any physical or virtual store/DC I am not sure what is your aim actually by listing.

Best regards,
Andras

entry.title: Re: Stay up-to-date with our content roadmap
entry.content:
Recently. we enabled the following two areas for the Open Documentation initiative:

Guide Title or Service TitleStatusLink
Application AutoscalerDoneReleased Version
SAP BTP Object StoreDoneReleased Version

entry.title: Re: ADT End of Runnable Exception
entry.content:
Yes it is all the same and up to date. 
Also the error was gone the next day, but after some programming it occured again.
It is like the cache is full and then the adt can not run the program anymore.

entry.title: Re: OData V2 Request fails and no error message is displayed
entry.content:
Hi Julia,

can you change the settings in the manifest.json to set useBatch to false.

Set a trace in the transaction /n/IWFND/TRACES and show us the details.

entry.title: Process Visbility Model Update using API
entry.content:
Hi Team,
I am trying to update a PV model using API '/rest/v1/scenario-definitions' in API Hub , but i am getting below error

{
    "error": {
        "code": "bpm.pvs.spa.scenario.updation.not.allowed",
        "message": "The visibility scenario you are trying to update is part of the 'id of proj' project. Redeploy the project to update it."
    }
}
Can anyone help on why this error is happening.
Regards,
Keerthana

entry.title: Re: Freight Unit is not created automatically for Sales O...
entry.content:

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Sum
entry.content:
Greetings experts,

I'm working on a project on SAP Analytics Cloud which requires me to put certain values in a table. These values are fed through a live BW connection and that in turn takes the values from a consumption cds view I created.

The issue I am facing lies in the fact that the report i'm trying to create with dynamically change according to a date input filter I have put in place. When filtering for a single PO and for a date range there might be more than one value being fed to the the table and causing SAC to hide the values.

So my question is there any way I can sum all values being returned to the table and then since its already filtering the dates, it would dynamically change said sum?

 

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Re: Be Comfortable, Authentic and Interview the Interviewer 🧑🏻‍💻
entry.content:
Super Kunal...

Very very insightful..

entry.title: Re: if end if inside the case end -case
entry.content: Weird title, it's not a problem of IF ENDIF - CASE ENDCASE, it's a problem of why a conditional expression is evaluated true (false expected). Be careful to use an adequate question title. It's not initial because the data type is not D or not N length 8. I guess you have defined it C length 8 because in that case IS INITIAL is equivalent to all characters are spaces.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI to Microsoft SharePoint Adapter Integration
entry.content:
Hi @alexkowalczuk 
Thank you for this excellent blog. 
Can you please expand on the content modifier body that was passed as payload in the SharePoint adapter. Was it in binary format ? I saw a JSON as constant in the body, how was the file actually uploaded.

entry.title: Re: OData V2 Request fails and no error message is displayed
entry.content: Unfortunately this is not possible since this is only reproducible on our customers system.

entry.title: Реферальный код Kucoin: QBAY9XT4 - Что дает реферальный код Kucoin?
entry.content:
Реферальный код Kucoin "QBAY9XT4" особенно используется новичками при регистрации учетной записи в 2024 году. Используйте реферальный код Kucoin для получения ваучеров, включая: ваучер на скидку 50% на комиссию за транзакцию и вознаграждения для новых пользователей на сумму до 10 000 долларов США. Кроме того, поделившись этим кодом, пользователи могут получить комиссию в размере до 25% от комиссии за транзакцию. Этот код применяется к большинству стран, включая Великобританию, Россию, Беларусь, Армению, Латвию, Францию, Турцию, Польшу, Японию, Украину, Данию, Италию, Испанию, Венгрию, Швецию, Швейцарию, Люксембург, Ирландию, Исландию, Португалию, Персидскую Республику. и арабоязычные страны, Египет и Нидерланды. Зарегистрируйтесь на Kucoin с реферальным кодом "QBAY9XT4", чтобы получить привлекательные ваучеры.

Криптовалютная биржа:Kucoin
Kucoin pеферальный код QBAY9XT4
Сниженная комиссия за транзакциюдо 50%
Приветственный бонусБонус в размере 10 000 долларов США.
Скидка и бонус100% пожизненная скидка и бонус в размере 5000 долларов США.

entry.title: 🚀 **Must-Watch Video Alert: Unlock the Power of SAP Commerce Workflows!** 🚀
entry.content:
🔗 [Watch Now!](Recapping Workflow Management for Workflow Automated Actions in SAP Commerce Cloud - openSAP Microlearning)

Are you tired of mundane and tedious workflow management tasks? Well, we have some fantastic news for you! Our latest video provides an in-depth guide on how to harness the true potential of the SAP Commerce Workflow extension. Revolutionize your workflow processes and elevate team collaboration like never before!

In this video, we delve into:
- Designing both human- and system-based workflows.
- Efficiently assigning actions to specific users or user groups.
- Attaching task-relevant items and comments to workflows.
- Seamlessly starting and tracking workflows using the Collaboration Center.

Whether you're a business owner or an IT professional, this video will empower you with the knowledge to optimize and automate your workflows effectively.

Discover critical features, visual editors, automated steps, and so much more.

Embark on this transformational journey to workflow mastery! 🌟

🔗 **Catch the action in our invaluable tutorial here:** [Watch Now!](Recapping Workflow Management for Workflow Automated Actions in SAP Commerce Cloud - openSAP Microlearning)

Unlock the full potential of your workflows and boost your productivity exponentially today!

entry.title: Реферальный код CoineX: 8c5ws - Что дает реферальный код CoineX?
entry.content:
Реферальный код CoineX "8c5ws" особенно используется новичками при регистрации учетной записи в 2024 году. Используйте реферальный код CoineX для получения ваучеров, включая: ваучер на скидку 50% на комиссию за транзакцию и вознаграждения для новых пользователей на сумму до 10 000 долларов США. Кроме того, поделившись этим кодом, пользователи могут получить комиссию в размере до 25% от комиссии за транзакцию. Этот код применяется к большинству стран, включая Великобританию, Россию, Беларусь, Армению, Латвию, Францию, Турцию, Польшу, Японию, Украину, Данию, Италию, Испанию, Венгрию, Швецию, Швейцарию, Люксембург, Ирландию, Исландию, Португалию, Персидскую Республику. и арабоязычные страны, Египет и Нидерланды. Зарегистрируйтесь на CoineX с реферальным кодом "8c5ws", чтобы получить привлекательные ваучеры.

Криптовалютная биржа:CoineX
CoineX pеферальный код 8c5ws
Сниженная комиссия за транзакциюдо 50%
Приветственный бонусБонус в размере 10 000 долларов США.
Скидка и бонус100% пожизненная скидка и бонус в размере 5000 долларов США.

entry.title: Re: SAP Variant <> of program <> is not the current version
entry.content:
It's not clear what you mean concerning "all the tables" because a Program Variant is not related to tables.

You should run the program RSVARDOC_610 only for the program for which you have the error message.

If you mean that the program RSVARDOC_610 doesn't output any information about which programs need to be adjusted, you may easily create a short custom program which runs RSVARDOC_610 for each program variant, you extract the program variant before and after execution via the below statement (IMPORT DIRECTORY), and compare LT_CDIR to know if the program variant has changed:

IMPORT DIRECTORY INTO lt_cdir FROM DATABASE vari(va) CLIENT ls_vari-mandt ID ls_rkey.
